note: Text graphic showing: 'ต้นกำเนิด AI จากเด็กหนุ่มไร้บ้าน' with slow zoom-in on paper textures.
Historical photo of Walter Pitts and Warren McCulloch overlayed on mathematical sketches.
Animation showing biological neuron firing and turning into a simple binary AND logic gate.
Archival photo or video of Frank Rosenblatt pointing at blackboards or paper charts.
Typography overlay: 'NO CODE' with glitch effects over analog electronics background.
Pan across the massive electromechanical racks of the Mark I Perceptron.
Close-up macro shot of copper wire coils and small motors rotating analog dials and gears.
Graphic text overlay: '1969: The Death of AI' with fading timeline animation.
Mathematical graph showing 4 dots (2 red, 2 blue) crossed, showing that a single straight line cannot separate them (XOR problem).
Artistic shot of cold, snowy university buildings or frosted microchips to represent the first AI Winter.
Mathematical equations of partial derivatives and chain rule flying forward in glowing white lines.
Diagram showing a multi-layer neural network adjusting weights, drawing a curved decision boundary to successfully classify XOR.
Quick camera sweep through a glowing, high-tech modern AI data center with blue/purple LED lights.
Dynamic visualization of massive numbers and matrix multiplications flowing on screen like a waterfall of light.
Text graphic overlay of the final punchline with fading cinematic glow, showing the title 'จากสมการ สู่โมเดล'.
